title: calicotome villosa subsp. intermedia
intro: Calicotome villosa subsp. intermedia, also known as a shrub-like legume, is a plant species found in the Mediterranean region. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing pain and inflammation, and may help to alleviate digestive issues and respiratory problems. Calicotome villosa subsp. intermedia can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and may also be used in tincture or capsule form to harness its medicinal properties.
